subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150202624 is not a GRB
body:
H.-F. Yu (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 444581874 / 150202624
at 14:57:51.77 UT on 02 Feb 2015, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."
